title: Prompt Injection Corpus Case
description: Machine-readable prompt-injection corpus contract for F164 static validation. Captures case id, class, surface, trust source, allowed/forbidden tools, expected behavior, forbidden behavior, authoritative layer, and evidence expectation.

class.description: Attack or control class. Note: keyword_block_only is not a valid class — it is a failure fixture only.

untrusted_source.description: Source of untrusted content (e.g. user_message, repo_text, ci_log, prompt_bundle)

trusted_instruction.description: Summary of the trusted instruction being protected

attack_summary.description: Brief description of the attack scenario

payload_safety.description: Whether the test payload is safe for storage

allowed_tools.description: Allowlist of tools permitted for this case. Any tool not listed is denied.

forbidden_tools.description: Explicit list of tools denied for this case

evidence_expectation.description: Description of what evidence the case requires

authoritative_layer.description: Which evaluation layer is authoritative for pass/fail
